description_long: This object is a spherical vending machine with a striking deep purple and black coloration, featuring a subtle grid pattern and scattered points of light reminiscent of a star field. The surface is smooth and glossy, with areas of brighter magenta and violet hues that create a cosmic, almost ethereal appearance. There are no visible seams, doors, or mechanical components, giving it a seamless, futuristic look. The object lacks any clear display panels, payment interfaces, or product retrieval slots, making its method of interaction ambiguous. Its overall form is perfectly round, with no flat surfaces or protrusions. The coloration and finish suggest a high-tech, possibly digital or holographic vending experience.
description: A glossy, spherical vending machine with a cosmic purple and black color scheme, featuring a grid pattern and scattered points of light.
description_view_0: The sphere appears mostly dark with faint purple highlights and scattered light points, showing minimal surface detail.
description_view_1: This view reveals a brighter magenta area on the right, with the grid pattern and star-like points more visible.
description_view_2: The grid pattern and magenta clouds are most prominent here, with a concentration of light points and a luminous effect.
description_view_3: A darker side of the sphere with subtle purple highlights and a faint grid, less luminous than view 2.
